examples: He became a pariah after his friends found out about his lies.
The corrupt politician was treated as a pariah.
In the world of art, he was considered a pariah due to his unconventional methods.
आपका लक्ष्य आपका मुकाम निर्धारित करता है।
मेरे पास अपने मुकाम तक पहुंचने का कोई शॉर्टकट नहीं था।
